name: Orange-Butterscotch Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, margarine, brown sugar, and flour. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, orange peel, and vanilla. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Pour the mixture over the crust.
5. Bake at 325 degrees F for 1 hour and 5 minutes.
6. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and chill.
7. In a saucepan, combine brown sugar, corn syrup, and margarine. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
8. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Let cool slightly.
9. Spoon over the cheesecake and garnish with an orange slice and fresh mint if desired.
